title: The Living Data Project: Data Rescue Guidebook
text:
This guide supports graduate student data rescue teams participating in the Living Data Project.


After working through and referring back to this guide, students should be better equipped to:

Assess legacy datasets
Create high-quality metadata
Apply reproducible workflows
Prepare datasets for DataStream and other repositories
Practice responsible data stewardship




Work through the individual pages using the templates and checklists provided throughout.
crumbs: The Living Data Project: Data Rescue Guidebook
